zh.lifeSummary: 當Susanna Verch Gruffydd Princess of Wales於1095年出生在威爾士凱爾納方史爾時，她的父親King Cynan Brochael Garwyn of Powys40歲，母親Angharad ferch Owain30歲。她於1120年與King Madog of Powys在英國威爾斯結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1172年3月在英國威爾斯享年77歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Susanna Verch Gruffydd Princess of Wales于1095年出生在威尔士凱爾納方史爾时，她的父亲King Cynan Brochael Garwyn of Powys40岁，母亲Angharad ferch Owain30岁。她于1120年与King Madog of Powys在英国威尔斯结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1172年3月在英国威尔斯享年77岁。

nameMeanings.name: Gruffydd
meanings: Welsh: The Welsh name; from creffydd, strong faith, or strong in faith. Gruffydd, a Welsh form of Gryffydd.

nameMeanings.name: Susanna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament form (Luke 8:3) of the Hebrew name Shoshana (from shoshan ‘lily’, which in modern Hebrew also means ‘rose’).

Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

en.lifeSummary: When Susanna Verch Gruffydd Princess of Wales was born in 1095, in Caernarfonshire, Wales, her father, King Cynan Brochael Garwyn of Powys, was 40 and her mother, Angharad ferch Owain, was 30. She married King Madog of Powys in 1120, in Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. She died in March 1172, in Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 77.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Susanna Verch Gruffydd Princess of Wales est née en 1095, à Caernarfonshire, Galles, son père, King Cynan Brochael Garwyn of Powys, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Angharad ferch Owain, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé King Madog of Powys en 1120, à Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en mars 1172, à Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 77 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Susanna Verch Gruffydd Princess of Wales 1095 in Caernarfonshire, Wales geboren wurde, war ihr Vater King Cynan Brochael Garwyn of Powys 40 und ihre Mutter Angharad ferch Owain 30. Sie hat 1120 in Wales, United Kingdom King Madog of Powys geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb im März 1172 im Alter von 77 Jahren in Wales, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Susanna Verch Gruffydd Princess of Wales è nata il nel 1095 nel Caernarfonshire, Galles, sua padre, King Cynan Brochael Garwyn of Powys, aveva 40 anni e sua madre, Angharad ferch Owain, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato King Madog of Powys nel 1120, nel Galles, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel marzo 1172, nel Galles, Regno Unito, all'età di 77 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Susanna Verch Gruffydd Princess of Walesが1095年にウェールズケエルナルフォンシュアイアで生まれた時，父King Cynan Brochael Garwyn of Powysは40歳，母Angharad ferch Owainは30歳であった。1120年にイギリスウェールズでKing Madog of Powysと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1172年3月にイギリスウェールズで77歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Susanna Verch Gruffydd Princess of Wales(이)가 1095년 웨일스 카이른아르폰실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 King Cynan Brochael Garwyn of Powys(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Angharad ferch Owain(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1120년 영국 웨일스에서 King Madog of Powys(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1172년 3월 영국 웨일스에서 77세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Susanna Verch Gruffydd Princess of Wales nasceu em 1095, em Caernarfonshire, Gales, seu pai, King Cynan Brochael Garwyn of Powys, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Angharad ferch Owain, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com King Madog of Powys em 1120, em Gales, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em março de 1172, em Gales, United Kingdom, com 77 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Susanna Verch Gruffydd Princess of Wales родилась в 1095 г. в местности каирнарфоншир, Уэльс, её отцу по имени King Cynan Brochael Garwyn of Powys было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Angharad ferch Owain, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени King Madog of Powys в 1120 г. в местности Уэльс, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла марта 1172 г. в местности Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 77 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Susanna Verch Gruffydd Princess of Wales nació en 1095, en Caernarfonshire, Gales, su papá, King Cynan Brochael Garwyn of Powys, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Angharad ferch Owain, tenía 30 años. Se casó con King Madog of Powys en 1120, en Gales, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en marzo de 1172, en Gales, Reino Unido, a la edad de 77 años.
